data.title: Cardinal Health grows its Vantus HQ ecommerce platform
data.description: The move aligns with broader industry trends, as health care distributors race to digitize ordering systems and improve self-service tools for customers ranging from independent pharmacies to national chains.

data.title: Conveyor raises $20 million to design agentic AI for B2B sales tasks
data.description: Conveyor’s platform reflects a growing trend in B2B ecommerce: embedding AI directly into the sales process to reduce delays in complex, high-value transactions.

data.title: Online to outpace in-store grocery sales growth through 2029
data.description: Brick Meets Click and Attain data shows how grocery sales growth has shifted so far in 2025, as well as how it could continue to do so through 2029.

data.title: Lowe's Creator Network launches with MrBeast among first to join
data.description: Lowe's said its network allows creators to earn through their content through commissions and customizable storefronts linked directly to Lowes.com. It also features a multi-tiered system with varying advantages.

data.title: Essendant taps Roadie to strengthen ecommerce delivery capabilities
data.description: The Roadie integration builds on a foundation by enabling Essendant to better serve B2B, B2C, and B2B2C channels through more responsive and scalable delivery solutions.
